ExportQuery:
select
 named_struct("id",ProviderID,"providerLastName",ProviderLastName,"NPI",ProviderNPI) as provider
,ARRAY(
	named_struct("groupId",LocationGroupID,
	"location",Array(named_struct("ranking", COALESCE(LocationRanking,1), "IDType", LocationIDType,"ID", LocationID, "desc", LocationDesc, "TIN", LocationTIN, "address", named_struct("line1", LocationAddress1, "line2", LocationAddress2, "city", 			LocationCity, "state", LocationState, "zipCode", LocationZip, "countyCode", CountyCode)
		, "phoneNumber", PhoneNumber
		, "faxNumber", FaxNumber
		, "contactPerson", ContactPerson
		, "doNotChase", DoNotChase
		, "tiers", Array(named_struct("IDType", Tier2IDType, "ID", Tier2ID, "desc", Tier2Desc, 
			"address", named_struct("line1", Tier2Address1, "line2", Tier2Address2, "city", Tier2City, "state", Tier2State, "zipCode", Tier2Zip, "CountyCode", null)))
		, "startDate", date_format(StartDate,"MM\/dd\/yyyy")
		, "endDate", date_format(EndDate,"MM\/dd\/yyyy")
		))
))as groups
FROM QueryResult
where FileLayoutDescription = 'CHCProvider' and 
ifnull(ProviderID, "") <> ""
and 
ifnull(ProviderLastName, "") <> ""
and 
ifnull(ProviderNPI, "") <> ""
AND
ifnull(LocationAddress1, "") <> ""
AND
ifnull(LocationCity, "") <> ""
AND
ifnull(LocationState, "") <> ""
AND
ifnull(LocationZip, "") <> ""
